Strategies for the prevention and treatment of peritoneal metastases in large Borrmann type III and type IV gastric cancer
reasoning_research: The article is a clinical review on gastric cancer treatment, completely outside the domains of decision neuroscience and computational psychology. No methodological rigor, modeling, or human behavioral data relevant to self-control or attention is presented.
reasoning_impact: The paper has no relevance to self-control, attention, or decision-making processes in the stated fields. It addresses a surgical oncology topic and thus offers no implications for future research in decision neuroscience or computational psychology.
journal: Zhonghua wei chang wai ke za zhi = Chinese journal of gastrointestinal surgery
